Product features:

  • Elevated Pet Sofa: This durable and elegant Small and Medium dog sofa is perfect for your dog or cat; It is stylish and modern enough to place in any room of the house for a comfortable sleeping spot for your furry friend.
  • Cute and Comfortable Pet Furniture: This dog bed is truly a piece of furniture; just like a smaller sofa for your pets; While you lounge on the couch, your pet can use their own sofa and be calm and take comfort in their own space.
  • Raised Style: Avoid uncomfortable floor cushions with an elevated dog sofa bed for your pet; This dog couch will be loved by all your pets; so be warned, if you have multiple pets, you may need to buy more than one.
  • Durable and easy to clean: The high quality fabric allows for quick and easy on-site cleaning with the use of cleaning agents; Thick and comfortable padding for extra comfort for your pet; Durable stitches suitable for everyday use.
  • Dog Sofa for Small and Medium Dogs Dimensions: 40"*23"*16"
